nasb.text: In this you greatly rejoice, even though now for a little while, if necessary, you have been distressed by various trials,

esv.text: In this you rejoice, though now for a little while, if necessary, you have been grieved by various trials,

cnv.text: 因此，你們要喜樂。然而，你們現今在各種試煉中或許暫時會難過，

ccb.text: 为此，即使现今你们必须暂时在百般试炼中忍受痛苦，也要满怀喜乐。

csbs.text: 为此，你们欢欣跳跃，但如今必须在种种试炼中暂时忧伤，
